problem: Streamlit native multipage sidebar covered the phone viewport.
permanent_fixes: Root pages directory relocated to legacy_page_wrappers_disabled so Streamlit cannot auto-discover sidebar pages.
Permanent CSS hides native sidebar, navigation, collapsed control, and overlay while reclaiming full viewport width.
Legacy enable/unlock functions are compatibility no-ops and cannot re-enable the sidebar.
Legacy sidebar_nav no longer calls the native sidebar API.
Main Page Menu remains the single navigation and connection surface.
note: Automated Streamlit phone-mode and sidebar regression checks passed. A physical iPhone was not available inside the build container.
